segment.source: Renders a two-, three-, or four-column grid of KPI cards, each with a large metric value, a trend indicator (positive, neutral, caution) shown as an arrow, a label, and optional detail text, under eyebrow, heading, and subheadline. Use it for: key figures from annual reports, dashboard-style metrics, growth statistics with direction, results sections. Prefer 'Counter Stats' or 'Stats Section' for animated counting numbers; 'Metric Dashboard' when a chart panel is required.
